title: centrosema vexillatum
intro: Centrosema vexillatum, also known as the bush pea or prickly bean, is a plant species within the legume family, native to South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of lectins and flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centrosema vexillatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
